files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/server.ts b/server.ts
index fcfb883..2936333 100644
--- a/server.ts
+++ b/server.ts
@@ -4532,3 +4532,3 @@ app.get("/api/workspace-overview", dashboardAuth, async (req: Request, res: Resp
     prospectTotalR, prospectInterestedR, prospectCalledR,
-    dncCountR, avgConfidenceR,
+    dncCountR, avgConfidenceR, summariesGeneratedR, callbackTasksCreatedR, ownerEmailAlertsSentR,
   ] = await Promise.all([
@@ -4564,2 +4564,11 @@ app.get("/api/workspace-overview", dashboardAuth, async (req: Request, res: Resp
     sql`SELECT AVG(confidence) as avg FROM contact_custom_fields ccf JOIN contacts co ON ccf.contact_id = co.id WHERE ccf.confidence IS NOT NULL AND co.workspace_id = ${wsId}`,
+    sql`SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM call_summaries WHERE workspace_id = ${wsId}`,
+    sql`SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM tasks WHERE task_type = 'callback' AND workspace_id = ${wsId}`,
+    sql`
+      SELECT COUNT(*) as count
+      FROM call_events ce
+      JOIN calls c ON c.call_sid = ce.call_sid
+      WHERE c.workspace_id = ${wsId}
+        AND ce.event_type IN ('OWNER_EMAIL_ALERT_SENT', 'VOICEMAIL_EMAIL_SENT')
+    `,
   ]);
@@ -4599,2 +4608,5 @@ app.get("/api/workspace-overview", dashboardAuth, async (req: Request, res: Resp
   const avgFieldConfidence = avgConfidenceR[0].avg ? Math.round(Number(avgConfidenceR[0].avg) * 100) : null;
+  const summariesGenerated = Number(summariesGeneratedR[0].count);
+  const callbackTasksCreated = Number(callbackTasksCreatedR[0].count);
+  const ownerEmailAlertsSent = Number(ownerEmailAlertsSentR[0].count);
 
@@ -4621,2 +4633,5 @@ app.get("/api/workspace-overview", dashboardAuth, async (req: Request, res: Resp
     fieldsExtracted,         // total AI-extracted CRM fields across all contacts
+    summariesGenerated,      // proof metric: summaries generated for recorded calls
+    callbackTasksCreated,    // proof metric: callback tasks created
+    ownerEmailAlertsSent,    // proof metric: owner alert events sent
     dataCaptureCoverage,     // % of contacts with a name captured

files.reason: Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/src/App.tsx b/src/App.tsx index 31a4d29..b921c31 100644 --- a/src/App.tsx +++ b/src/App.tsx @@ -605,2 +605,5 @@ type Stats = { fieldsExtracted?: number; + summariesGenerated?: number; + callbackTasksCreated?: number; + ownerEmailAlertsSent?: number; dataCaptureCoverage?: number; // % contacts with name @@ -1134,2 +1137,29 @@ function DashboardPage({ stats, activeCalls, recentCalls, onCallClick, onTabChan + {/* Missed-call proof */} +
+

+
{m.value}

{m.label}
